# Serene Minds Psychotherapy

> Licensed psychotherapy for Florida residents via secure, HIPAA-compliant telehealth. Founded by Faramroze (Fram) Sarkari, M.S., LMHC — a Licensed Mental Health Counselor and Qualified Clinical Supervisor with 20+ years of experience. Sessions in English, Gujarati, and Hindi. Self-pay rate: $150 per 50-minute session. Free 15-minute consultation available.

## Contact

- Phone: (786) 972-7110
- Email: info@serenemindspsychotherapy.com
- Booking: https://calendly.com/serenemindspsychotherapy-info/free-consultation
- Website: https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/
- Service area: State of Florida (telehealth only) — Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Tampa, Orlando, Jacksonville, and all Florida cities
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM ET

## Practitioner

- Name: Faramroze (Fram) Sarkari
- Credentials: M.S., LMHC (Licensed Mental Health Counselor, Florida)
- Also: Qualified Clinical Supervisor for Registered Mental Health Counselor Interns
- Experience: 20+ years in clinical mental health
- Languages: English, Gujarati, Hindi
- Modalities: CBT, DBT, ACT, EMDR, IFS, Mindfulness-Based Therapy, Motivational Interviewing, IPSRT, CBT-SAD, Gottman Method

## Services

- [Individual Therapy](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/online-therapy-florida.html): Depression, anxiety, ADHD, trauma, grief, life transitions
- [Couples Counseling](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/marriage-counseling-miami.html): Communication, conflict, infidelity, premarital
- [Family Therapy](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/family-therapy-florida.html): Parent-child, blended families, family conflict
- [Child & Teen Therapy](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/child-teen-therapy-florida.html): Anxiety, depression, ADHD, school stress, self-esteem
- [Women's Programs](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/womens-therapy-florida.html): Postpartum depression, women's mental health, life transitions
- [Clinical Supervision](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/clinical-supervision-florida.html): For Florida Registered Mental Health Counselor Interns
- [Online Therapy](https://serenemindspsychotherapy.com/online-therapy-florida.html): Secure HIPAA-compliant telehealth statewide

## Conditions Treated

Depression (major, postpartum, seasonal, treatment-resistant, in pregnancy, in women, teens), Anxiety (GAD, social anxiety, panic attacks), PTSD, Trauma, Grief, ADHD (adults and children), Bipolar Disorder, Schizophrenia, Eating Disorders, Burnout, Codependency, Compulsive Lying, Narcissistic Abuse recovery, Toxic Relationships, Trust Issues, Overthinking, People-Pleasing, Anger Management, Guilt & Shame, Mommy Issues, Betrayal Trauma, Attachment Issues, Trichotillomania, Divorce, Breakups, Cancer Grief.

## Pricing & Payment

- Standard rate: $150 per 50-minute session (self-pay)
- Free 15-minute consultation
- Payment: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, Zelle, HSA, FSA
- Superbills provided for out-of-network insurance reimbursement
